Senior Vice President, People Operations
View Profile
Email
Atlanta has been ranked one of the best cities for business over the past several years, and is ranked as one of the
top 20 fastest growing cities
in the U.S. As Gray strategically looked for opportunities to expand its reach beyond existing locations into new territory, Atlanta was one place that made perfect sense.
This exciting area is intriguing for both the business and team members. The new office location is near Truist Park, home to the Atlanta Braves, and the office campus has a pedway to
The Battery
– featuring shopping, dining, and plenty of fun!
The Atlanta market is strategically located in a historically business-rich area of the country for Gray, the southeast, where the company already has strong ties and is looking to continually expand its reach and impact.
